dataset_manifest.source_policy: Generated mechanism-layer seed text from papers/manuals/expert-rule style statements; no processed Baosteel production data used.
dataset_manifest.evaluation_policy: Final seed metrics are reported on the test split only. The rule-based baseline uses only train-split entity lexicon to avoid full-dataset leakage.
caveats: This is an expanded engineering seed dataset with challenge records, not a paper-scale benchmark.
Use real papers/manuals and double annotation before reporting publishable results.

caveat: Deterministic seed/proxy experiment; replace proxy extractor/adjudicator with real PLM and LLM backends for publishable results.
